login.title: Sign In
login.description: Sign in to your account to view your orders and manage your profile.
login.signInFailed: Could not start sign-in. Please try again.
login.secureNote: Sign-in and password management are securely handled by Shopify. Your credentials are processed only on Shopify's servers.

register.title: Register
register.description: Create an account to track your orders and enjoy a faster checkout experience.

errors.emailInUse: This email address is already in use
errors.alreadyEnabled: You already have an account. Please sign in.
errors.verifyEmail: We sent a link to your email. Please verify your address, then sign in.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password is too short. Please choose a longer password.
errors.passwordWhitespace: Password cannot start or end with spaces.
errors.emailInvalidDomain: That email domain looks invalid. Please check the address.
errors.inputBlank: Please fill in all required fields.
errors.inputInvalid: One of the values you entered is invalid.
errors.inputTooShort: One of the fields is too short.
errors.inputTooLong: One of the fields is too long.
errors.inputContainsUrl: URLs are not allowed in this field.
errors.inputContainsHtml: HTML tags are not allowed in this field.
errors.tokenInvalid: This link or token is invalid or has expired.
errors.addressNotFound: We could not find that address.
errors.multipassInvalid: Sign-in via multipass could not be completed.
errors.unidentifiedCustomer: No account was found for this email.
errors.shopifyUnavailable: We could not reach the store. Please try again in a moment.
errors.registrationFailed: Registration could not be completed. Please try again.

errors.required: First and last name are required.
